hooks.command: if [ -f FEATURE_CONTEXT.md ]; then echo 'A FEATURE_CONTEXT.md exists in this project. If meaningful decisions, rejected alternatives, new constraints, or progress were made in this session, run /anchor now to update it before the session ends. Skip if no substantive changes.'; else echo 'No FEATURE_CONTEXT.md in this project. If this session involved substantive feature work (design decisions, implementation choices, rejected alternatives, multi-step scope), run /anchor-init [feature-name] to create one and capture the context. Skip for quick questions, exploration, or one-off fixes.'; fi
